name: Foundation/metadata
description: CapabilityStatement (/metadata) conformance tests: response shape, the patient-everything operation advertisement, and HTTP error handling for invalid _format/_pretty/_summary/_elements parameters (from MetadataTests).

test.name: metadata returns a well-formed CapabilityStatement advertising patient-everything
test.description: GET /metadata must return HTTP 200 with a CapabilityStatement that advertises the patient-everything operation (warningOnly: a server-specific extension, not required by base FHIR R4).

assert.description: Response body must be a CapabilityStatement
CapabilityStatement should advertise the patient-everything operation with its canonical definition URI (warningOnly: server-specific extension)

test.name: metadata with an unsupported _format value returns 406 Not Acceptable
test.description: An unsupported _format value must return HTTP 406 Not Acceptable.

operation.description: Request metadata with an invalid _format value

assert.description: Invalid _format must return HTTP 406 Not Acceptable

test.name: metadata with an invalid _pretty value returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: An invalid _pretty value must return HTTP 400 Bad Request, whether clearly non-boolean ('abc') or a near-miss boolean-like token ('1'); the near-miss case is warningOnly since some servers may leniently accept '1'/'0' as boolean.

operation.description: Request metadata with a non-boolean _pretty value ('abc').
Request metadata with a near-miss boolean-like _pretty value ('1').

assert.description: Near-miss boolean-like _pretty value must return HTTP 400 (warningOnly: some servers may leniently accept '1'/'0')

test.name: metadata with an invalid _summary value returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: An unrecognized _summary value must return HTTP 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: Request metadata with an invalid _summary value

test.name: metadata with an invalid _elements value returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: An empty _elements list must return HTTP 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: Request metadata with an empty _elements value
